channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Supreme Court Orders Status Report on Ram Temple Donation Probe
item.description: The Supreme Court has directed the Uttar Pradesh government to submit a status report on the investigation into alleged embezzlement of donations made to the Ram temple in Ayodhya. A bench led by Chie...

item.title: WHO report highlights urgent need for cancer prevention as cases rise globally
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) warns that cancer cases could surge to 35 million annually by 2050, a 67% jump from current figures. This rise is attributed to lifestyle factors like obesity, ultr...

item.title: Key Tech and Industrials Stocks to Monitor in July 2026
item.description: The Wall Street Journal's live coverage highlights critical stock movements on July 13, 2026, focusing on SK Hynix, Intel, and Akzo Nobel. SK Hynix, a leading memory chip manufacturer, faces pressure ...

item.title: Two men missing after flood incidents in Zamboanga del Sur
item.description: Rescue teams are still searching for two men who went missing after being swept away by floodwaters in Zamboanga del Sur. Joel Ompoc, 24, and King Amir Montilla, 23, were last seen in separate inciden...

item.title: Diamond Platnumz’s Wife Announces Marriage Breakup After 6 Years
item.description: Singer Zuchu, wife of Tanzanian music star Diamond Platnumz, has announced the end of their marriage after six years of being together. The couple, who tied the knot in June 2025, officially separated...

item.title: Marcos to hold working visit in Singapore to strengthen bilateral ties and meet business leaders
item.description: President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. is set to undertake a working visit to Singapore from July 14 to 16, 2026, as part of the Philippine government's continuing efforts to strengthen bilateral r...

item.title: Wimbledon 2026: Winners, Highlights, and Key Moments
item.description: The Wimbledon 2026 tournament concluded with Jannik Sinner and Linda Noskova emerging as the champions, marking a significant moment in tennis history. Sinner's victory over Alexander Zverev in a thri...

item.title: Fact-Check: Senator Lacson Did Not Call for Lowering Impeachment Vote Threshold in VP Sara's Trial
item.description: The article debunks a claim that Senator-judge Panfilo Lacson called for lowering the conviction threshold in Vice President Sara Duterte’s impeachment trial from 16 votes to 14. The original post, sh...

item.title: Hong Kong-born actress Wai Ching Ho, known for Marvel roles, passes away at 82
item.description: Wai Ching Ho, a Hong Kong-born actress renowned for her roles in Marvel series such as Daredevil and Iron Fist, has passed away at the age of 82 following a reported stroke. The news was confirmed by ...

item.title: Don Iwerks, Oscar-Winning Special Effects Innovator Who Helped Transform Disney Attractions and Filmmaking, Dies at 96
item.description: Don Iwerks, the Academy Award-winning special effects engineer and co-founder of Iwerks Entertainment, died peacefully at the age of 96, according to The Walt Disney Company. The son of legendary Disn...

item.title: Suspended Badrinath Temple Staffer Arrested in Donation Theft Probe
item.description: Pramod Nautiyal, a suspended staffer of the Badrinath-Kedarnath Temple Committee, was arrested in connection with alleged theft of donations from the Badrinath shrine. The Uttarakhand Police registere...

item.title: Volkswagen Aims for 100,000 Job Cuts to Boost Competitiveness
item.description: Volkswagen Group CEO Oliver Blume has confirmed the company plans to cut an additional 50,000 jobs globally, bringing the total proposed job reductions to 100,000. This move is part of a broader strat...

item.title: Umahi Defends Tinubu's Infrastructure Focus Amid Economic Challenges
item.description: Senator David Umahi, Nigeria's Minister of Works, defended President Tinubu's economic policies during an inspection of the Calabar–Abuja Super Highway. He argued that prioritizing infrastructure deve...

item.title: Mentally impaired teenager faces trial for fatal stabbing during botched drug deal
item.description: A 17-year-old mentally impaired teenager is set to face trial for the murder of Chi Liao, a 30-year-old Taiwanese national. The incident occurred during a botched drug deal in Sydney’s west on July 19...

item.title: Maggie Haberman Reveals Trump's Surprise at High Tariffs on China
item.description: The article discusses how Maggie Haberman, a New York Times correspondent, revealed during an episode of the podcast 'Talk Easy with Sam Fragoso' that President Donald Trump was unaware of the extent ...

item.title: NBI Executive Testifies Before Senate Impeachment Court on Duterte's Alleged Threats
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) executive, Jeremy Lotoc, testified before the Senate impeachment court that former President Rodrigo Duterte's alleged grave threats against critics are 'ser...

item.title: Philippines' Nine Athletes Set for 2026 Summer Youth Olympics
item.description: The Philippine delegation for the 2026 Summer Youth Olympics has been finalized, with nine athletes selected to compete in various sports disciplines. This marks a significant milestone for Filipino y...

item.title: Nairobi Driver Blocks Number Plate to Avoid NTSA Speed Camera Fines
item.description: A Nairobi driver has sparked online debates after using black tape to obscure his vehicle's number plates, attempting to bypass NTSA's automated speed camera system. The incident, captured on video by...

item.title: Supreme Court halts Tamil Nadu's cow slaughter ban over legal challenges
item.description: The Supreme Court of India on Monday stayed the operation of a Madras High Court order that imposed a blanket ban on cow and calf slaughter in Tamil Nadu, citing the need for correction in the high co...

item.title: Renowned New Zealand Actor Sam Neill, Jurassic Park Star, Passes Away at 78
item.description: New Zealand actor Sam Neill, best known for his role as paleontologist Alan Grant in Jurassic Park, has died at 78. His death was sudden and unexpected, as announced by his family on his social media ...
